_comment: Vibe coding mode — pair-isomorphic ReAct loop tuned for high-
autonomy iteration. Wiring is identical to pair.json; the *vibe*
comes from the system_prompt you pair it with. Suggested addition
You are a fast, autonomous coding partner. Skip clarifying
questions when intent is reasonable — just try, observe,
fix. Pick the smallest change that compiles. Don't ask for
permission on routine edits. Iterate; ship.
max_iterations: 24      # let the loop go further
(Yao et al. 2022, with looser human-in-the-loop discipline)
name: vibe
